rows.notes: Selected from gpt-5-mini. Its note correctly identifies two numeric groups on this line and justifies selecting the rightmost/final amount (4183 7 11) from the outer columns as the row's value. The description 'Battels.' is also more accurate than 'Batchelors'. gemini-flash's approach of extracting only the inner deduction amount and then inventing a separate total row (gemini-flash's row 5) is incorrect based on the visual layout.
